# Kravix

Kravix is a premium online food delivery application specializing in authentic Bengali, traditional Indian, and multi-cuisine dishes. Our motto is "Be Smart, Eat Better."

## Supported URLs

- Homepage: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/
- Search: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/search
- About: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/about
- Contact: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/contact
- FAQ: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/faq
- Help Center: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/help
- Blog: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/blog
- Privacy Policy: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/terms
- Refund Policy: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/refunds
- Login: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/login
- Register: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/register

## API Documentation

The backend is a microservices REST API deployed on Render.

- Base API Path: `/api/v1`
- Auth Service: `/api/v1/auth` (login, register, email verification, password reset, Google OAuth)
- Users: `/api/v1/users`
- Restaurants: `/api/v1/restaurants`
- Menu Items: `/api/v1/menu-items`
- Orders: `/api/v1/orders`
- Cart: `/api/v1/cart`
- Payments: `/api/v1/payments` (Razorpay, Stripe, COD)
- Riders: `/api/v1/riders`
- Reviews: `/api/v1/reviews`
- Coupons: `/api/v1/coupons`
- Analytics: `/api/v1/analytics`
- AI Assistant: `/api/v1/ai`
- Sitemap: https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Robots Guidance & AI Usage Policy

- Standard web crawling is allowed for search indexing.
- AI crawlers are requested to follow sitemap and robots constraints.
- Do not crawl `/admin`, `/seller`, `/rider`, `/cart`, `/checkout`, `/orders`, or `/account` paths — these are authenticated and not publicly indexable.
- Preferred Citations: "Kravix Food Delivery Service (https://kravix-nu.vercel.app/)"

- Support Email: support@kravix.com
- Partner Inquiries: support@kravix.com
